languages.text: {n}Оба техножреца оборачиваются на не сказавший ни слова сервочереп. Паскаль сверкает недобрым взглядом, а Эоганн открывает рот, чтобы возразить, но передумывает.{/n}
{n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Оба техножреца оборачиваются на не сказавший ни слова сервочереп. Паскаль сверкает недобрым взглядом, а Эоганн открывает рот, чтобы возразить, но передумывает.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Beide Techpriester wenden sich dem Servoschädel zu, der kein einziges Wort gesagt hat. Während ihn Pasqal böse anfunkelt, öffnet Eogunn den Mund, um zu widersprechen, besinnt sich dann aber eines Besseren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Beide Techpriester wenden sich dem Servoschädel zu, der kein einziges Wort gesagt hat. Während ihn Pasqal böse anfunkelt, öffnet Eogunn den Mund, um zu widersprechen, besinnt sich dann aber eines Besseren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les deux technoprêtres se tournent vers le servocrâne qui n'a pas prononcé un mot. Si Pasqal se contente de lui lancer un regard malveillant, Eogunn ouvre la bouche comme pour protester avant de se raviser.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les deux technoprêtres se tournent vers le servocrâne qui n'a pas prononcé un mot. Si Pasqal se contente de lui lancer un regard malveillant, Eogunn ouvre la bouche comme pour protester avant de se raviser.{/n}

languages.text: {n}两位技术神甫都转向一言不发的伺服头骨。帕斯卡恶狠狠地瞪着它，伊奥贡则张开嘴试图表示反对，虽然思考之后，还是没有开口。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}两位技术神甫都转向一言不发的伺服头骨。帕斯卡恶狠狠地瞪着它，伊奥贡则张开嘴试图表示反对，虽然思考之后，还是没有开口。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ambos tecnosacerdotes se giran hacia el servocráneo, que permanece mudo. Pasqal lo mira con malicia, mientras que Eogunn abre la boca para protestar pero cambia de parecer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ambos tecnosacerdotes se giran hacia el servocráneo, que permanece mudo. Pasqal lo mira con malicia, mientras que Eogunn abre la boca para protestar pero cambia de parecer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}テック・プリーストの二人は、一言も発しないサーボ・スカルの方を向く。パッカルは悪意を持って睨みつけ、エオグンは反論しようと口を開いたが、思いとどまった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İki Tekno Rahip de tek kelime etmemiş olan hizmelete dönüyor. Eogunn itiraz etmek için ağzını açıp sonra vazgeçerken Pasqal, kötü niyetli bir şekilde bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests turn toward the servo-skull, which has not uttered a single word. Pasqal glares malevolently while Eogunn opens his mouth to object, then thinks better of it.{/n}
